category_sources: Official repo https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp describes yt-dlp as a command-line audio/video downloader.
source_facts.description says it is a feature-rich command-line audio/video downloader.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains installation, usage, options, and output template documentation.
Official GitHub wiki is linked from the README for detailed instructions and FAQ.
repo_sources: Official GitHub repo title and README identify the project as yt-dlp.
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project page https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp.
tags_sources: Official README documents command-line media downloading and extractor options.
